admin_demo_user_private_invite_hint: When off, this demo user only accepts public/social invites.
admin_demo_user_sign_in_upload: Sign in as admin to upload images.
admin_demo_user_suggested: Profile text suggested — review and edit before publishing.
admin_demo_user_upload_hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP — max 8MB. Leave empty to use the gender media pool on publish.
admin_demo_users_lead_single: Create one demo consumer profile at a time with full profile fields and an exact city location. No Auth account is created.
business_email_verified_sign_in: Email verified. Sign in with your business password to continue.
community_banner_add_media: Add banner image from camera or gallery
community_banner_body_cycle_hint: Tap the text icon again to edit the next text block.
community_banner_youtube_embed_hint: The video must allow embedding. If playback fails, a cover image is shown instead. Avoid videos blocked on other devices or Premium limits.
community_banner_youtube_host_hint: You control the video with YouTube player buttons (play, pause, sound). Members only see it playing silently with no controls.
cover_photo_save_profile_hint: Cover uploaded — tap Save to keep it on your profile.
failed_save: Could not save. Please try again.
failed_save_invitees: Could not save invite list. Try again.
local_dev_embedded_preview_blocked: Sign-in does not work inside Cursor / VS Code preview.
local_dev_embedded_preview_hint: Open Chrome or Edge at http://localhost:5176/login?tab=business (copy from the terminal after npm run dev:fresh).
local_dev_oauth_firebase_domains: Firebase → Auth → Authorized domains: add localhost and 127.0.0.1 if missing. Then run: npm run deploy:firebase-auth
local_dev_oauth_google_step1: 1) Firebase → Authentication → Google → Enabled. Copy the Web client ID from Web SDK configuration:
local_dev_oauth_google_step2: 2) Google Cloud → Credentials → that Web client → add every origin below (port may be 5176 or 5177):
local_dev_oauth_preview_body: Use the button below to open login in Chrome. Sign in there — it will not carry over to this preview tab.
local_dev_oauth_preview_title: Cursor preview cannot complete Google sign-in.
social_preview_open_retry: Could not open preview yet. Please try again in a moment.
